TextEquiv.PlainText: N=o 47. 1 haddigalle Baddehellege Maarkoe in's honings Land pr te eken
TextEquiv.Unicode: N=o 47. 1 haddigalle Baddehellege Maarkoe in's honings Land pr te eken

TextEquiv.PlainText: 1 do. broeder gend. Philipoe woond in de gale Corle
TextEquiv.Unicode: 1 do. broeder gend. Philipoe woond in de gale Corle
